examples: The results showed that he solubility of xylitolincreased with adding impurities such as sorbitol or adonitol.
Sorbitol has one very odd property.
It contains artificial sweeteners called xylitol or sorbitol that help prevents cavities.
Finnish scientists found that children chewing Xylitol and Sorbitol gum suffered 40% fewer ear infections than non-chewers.
It can be made sugar-free by adding sorbitol, a substance that can have laxative effects at high doses.
